report.headline: Pune Real Estate Hits Record High in 2026: Hinjewadi & Hadapsar Lead Growth
report.executive_summary: Recent data synthesized from top economic journals indicates a 14% YOY price appreciation in the Hinjewadi IT corridor, heavily driven by the near-completion of Metro Line 3. Hadapsar townships are experiencing unprecedented rental yields of up to 5.2%.
infrastructure_updates: Pune Metro Line 3 trial runs successful; expected full commercial operation by Q3 2026.
Ring Road land acquisition completed in the western corridor, boosting Bavdhan property valuations.
New IT SEZ approved in Pune East, increasing demand for luxury 3 BHKs in Hadapsar.
